backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the Machine type (with MachinePart variant) and CRUD operations (add, update, delete, get, list) for a machine part tracking app, using a Map for storage and a migration hook.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (using cleaningTool field) to the new actor state (using machinePart field) by remapping each machine record.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the renaming of all user-facing 'cleaning' terminology to 'machine part' terminology across frontend files, with high confidence and a list of affected files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing their purpose and any terminology updates made as part of the machine-part renaming feature.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Machine Part Tracker' and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders the Dashboard page.
Dialog modal for adding a new machine, using MachinePart enum and machinePart field, with form validation and a backend mutation call.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: AlertDialog confirmation component that prompts the user before deleting a machine, showing a loading spinner during the backend delete call.
frontend/src/components/EditMachineModal: Dialog modal for editing an existing machine's details, pre-populating fields from the machine record including machinePart, and submitting updates via a backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/MachineCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single machine, displaying its name, number, part type, last replaced date, next due date, and status badge, with buttons to edit, delete, reschedule, and mark the part as done.
frontend/src/components/MachineFormField: Provides a reusable form field set for machine data entry, including inputs for name, machine number, part type (dropdown), last replaced date, and next due date.
frontend/src/components/OverdueAlertBann: Displays a dismissible alert banner listing all machines whose parts are overdue for replacement, hiding itself when no overdue machines exist or when dismissed.
frontend/src/components/RescheduleDateMo: A dialog modal that allows the user to set a new next-due date for a machine part, calling the reschedule mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/StatsBar.tsx: Renders a summary stats bar showing counts of total machines, on-schedule, due-soon, and overdue machines derived from the provided machine list.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge with a status dot indicating whether a machine part is ok, due soon, or overdue, based on its next-due date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on machines (get, add, update, delete) plus helpers to mark a part as done and reschedule next due dates, all communicating via an IC actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Barlow fonts, Tailwind directives, and defining CSS custom properties for light/dark industrial themes including status, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying all machines in a grid with a header, stats bar, overdue alert banner, loading skeletons, and an add-machine modal.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting between IC bigint nanosecond timestamps and JS Dates, computing machine status (ok/due-soon/overdue), formatting dates, and calculating next due intervals.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Barlow fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending action requests, primarily focused on renaming 'cleaning' terminology to 'machine part' across both frontend UI and backend Motoko actor.
